emails.subject: NG-PRICE_FinancialOnly.xls
emails.body: NG-PRICE_FinancialOnly.xls The file was too big to email. It contains all financial deals (P,B,I,GD) in the active NG-PRICE book. It does not contain any option deals. I will set up the new books so that we can move the net positive deals by counterparty. Let me know if you have any questions. It is saved in O:/_Dropbox. DG

emails.subject: RE: NG-PRICE_FinancialOnly.xls
emails.body: RE: NG-PRICE_FinancialOnly.xls Darron: The NG-PRICE file contains the information that we need. When you will be creating a new book with live financial in-the-money deals by counterparty, could you please refine it a bit further and exclude all Internal Enron entities and NYMEX. Should you have any questions please don't hesitate to give me a call at X3-4305. Thanks, Elena Elena E. Chilkina Enron Americas 713.853.4305
